title: sonar-migration-tool unified configuration
description: Unified config file shape consumed by every sonar-migration-tool command (extract, migrate, reset, predictive-report). Issue #266.

concurrency.description: Default max parallel HTTP calls. Overridden per command by source.concurrency / target.concurrency.

timeout.description: Default HTTP request timeout in seconds. Overridden per command by source.timeout / target.timeout.

export_directory.description: Root directory for extract / migrate output.

skip_issue_sync.description: When true (or on / yes / 1), skip the final per-issue and per-hotspot metadata sync after scan history is replayed. Defaults to false so the sync happens. Issue #299.

skip_project_data_migration.description: When true (or on / yes / 1), skip the entire project-data migration: the scan-history import AND the trailing issue + hotspot sync. Implies skip_issue_sync. Defaults to false so the data is migrated. Issue #303.

source.description: SonarQube Server connection + extract-time options. Consumed by `extract` (and ignored by `migrate` / `reset`).

target.description: SonarQube Cloud connection + migrate/reset-time options. Consumed by `migrate` and `reset` (and ignored by `extract`).

extract_type.description: Extract scope. "all" extracts every available task; otherwise the name of a specific extract task.

concurrency.description: Override the top-level concurrency for extract calls.

timeout.description: Override the top-level timeout for extract HTTP calls.

pem_file_path.description: Path to a client-side certificate PEM file for mTLS to SonarQube Server.

key_file_path.description: Path to the private key matching pem_file_path.

cert_password.description: Password for the client certificate, if any.

target_task.description: Stop extract at a specific task (all its dependencies are still run).

extract_id.description: Reuse an existing extract directory ID instead of generating a new one.

enterprise_key.description: PROVISIONAL — ignored today; reserved for future SQC-to-SQC migration source side.

organization_key.description: PROVISIONAL — ignored today; reserved for future SQC-to-SQC migration source side.

edition.description: PROVISIONAL — ignored today; the SQS edition is read live from /api/navigation/global.

run_id.description: Ignored by extract (kept here for shape symmetry with target).

url.description: SonarQube Cloud base URL (e.g. https://sonarcloud.io/). Mandatory.

enterprise_key.description: SonarQube Cloud enterprise key used to scope create/list/delete enterprise endpoints.

edition.description: SonarQube Cloud edition used to gate edition-specific tasks.

concurrency.description: Override the top-level concurrency for migrate/reset calls.

timeout.description: Override the top-level timeout for migrate/reset HTTP calls.

run_id.description: Resume an in-progress migrate run by ID. Null starts a fresh run.

target_task.description: Stop migrate at a specific task (all its dependencies are still run).

organization_key.description: PROVISIONAL — ignored today; reserved for future SQC-org-to-SQC-org migration target side.

default_organization.description: SonarQube Cloud organization key applied to every project when organizations.csv has no mapping defined. Ignored (with a WARN) when at least one row in organizations.csv carries a sonarcloud_org_key. CLI --default_organization overrides this. Issue #281.
